name: FPV Rate Profile Playground
short_desc: Visualize, compare, and share Betaflight Actual Rates profiles with a shareable URL API
author: cori
description: FPV Rate Profile Playground is a web-based tool for interactively configuring and comparing Betaflight Actual Rates profiles. Adjust roll, pitch, yaw, and throttle parameters with live graph updates, then generate a shareable URL to compare multiple profiles side-by-side. Includes a REST API so LLMs and scripts can POST profile data and receive a visualization URL in return. Import settings from Betaflight CLI dumps and export CLI commands to paste back into your FC.
